questions.text: You ______ a new bicycle very soon.

One-third of the first number is equal to two-fifth of the second number. If 32 is added to the first number, it becomes six times the second number. Find the first number.
In an election, a candidate got 70% of valid votes. If 15% votes are invalid and 20% did not vote, find votes received by winning candidate (total voters = 1,44,000).

A and B undertake to do a piece of work for ₹8964. A alone can do it in 8 days, while B can do it in 6 days. With the help of C, both of them complete the work in 3 days. How much of the money for the work should be paid to C?
In how many different ways can the letters of the word POLICE be arranged so that the vowels always come together?
Compared to Kolkata, what is the percentage increase of consumption of Sprite in Delhi?
The total surface area of a right circular cone of slant height 17 cm is 138 cm². Find the height (in cm).

A software engineer travels 10 km office at 72 km/h and returns at 36 km/h. Find average speed of whole journey.
Find the equation of the line passing through (1,4) and (3,2).
A businessman deposited ₹10,00,000 at 10% compound interest (half-yearly). Find amount after 2 years.
A thief runs at 9 km/h and a policeman runs at 11 km/h. Initial gap = 200 m. Find time to catch.
If √(4 + 3√2) + √(4 − 3√2) = k, find value of k lies between:

A, B and C can do a piece of work in 20, 30 and 60 days respectively. In how many days will they complete it working together?

Three people Abhimanyu, Minal and Vivian are standing at three different points. The distance between Minal and Abhimanyu is one-third of the distance between Minal and Vivian. If the distance between Vivian and Abhimanyu is 100 m, then what is the approximate distance (in m) between Minal and Abhimanyu?

The number of male and female voters in different wards namely W1, W2, W3, W4, W5 and W6 is shown in the graph. What percent of total male voters voted in ward 4 (record up to two decimal places) and what is the ratio of number of female voters voted in ward 3 and ward 5 respectively?
Choose the pair which is odd from the following options.
Aditya starts walking 12 m towards the West, then turns left and walks 20 m. He again turns left and walks 5 m. In which direction is he now with respect to the starting point?

If the digits given below are arranged in ascending order, then what is the sum of the numbers formed by the digits at the 3rd, 5th, 9th and 11th positions from the left? 45, 92, 37, 81, 55, 29, 13, 68, 74, 56
If 17th of a month falls on Friday, then what will be the day, 2 days after 2nd of the same month?

Six friends Arav, Isha, Shray, Divi, Ryan and Prisha sat for a test. Ryan scored more than Isha but less than Arav. Divi scored less than Prisha. Shray scored more than Divi but less than Isha. Which of the following is definitely incorrect?
options: Divi didn’t score more than Prisha
Ryan didn’t score more than Prisha
